title: Inventions and Creativity Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A narrow body of water between two pieces of land.
rounds.answer: straits
rounds.explanation: straits: A narrow body of water between two pieces of land.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A person who sees something happen with their own eyes.
rounds.answer: eyewitness
rounds.explanation: eyewitness: A person who sees something happen with their own eyes.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Something that has been set up or created and exists for a long time.
rounds.answer: established
rounds.explanation: established: Something that has been set up or created and exists for a long time.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A person who travels to new places to discover things.
rounds.answer: explorer

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A group of people who have the most power, wealth, or talent in a society.
rounds.answer: elite

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A promise to do something or to be loyal to someone or something.
rounds.answer: commitment

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The explorer found a new island in the ocean.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The dog was protecting its territory from other animals.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The eyewitness told the police what he saw during the accident.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Last Straits, part 1': “We’ll stop in the next _____ for supplies.” They relied on nearby nomads, who shared dried meat and sour milk in exchange...
rounds.answer: territory
rounds.explanation: The text says: “We’ll stop in the next territory for supplies.” They relied on nearby nomads, who shared dried meat and sour milk in exchange for medicine and solar batteries.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Inventions and Creativity: source text 2': Before the compass existed, sailors relied on the stars for _____.
rounds.answer: navigation
rounds.explanation: The text says: Before the compass existed, sailors relied on the stars for navigation.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Last Straits, part 2': “A forgotten _____, or a violent faction.
rounds.answer: civilization
rounds.explanation: The text says: “A forgotten civilization, or a violent faction.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: What did sailors use for navigation before the compass was invented?

A person who travels to new places to discover things.
Accept an accurate, well-explained response supported by relevant evidence from the selected text or texts.
rounds.answer: Accept an accurate, well-explained response supported by relevant evidence from the selected text or texts.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Accept an accurate, well-explained response supported by relevant evidence from the selected text or texts.

choices: A person who travels to new places to discover things.
Accept an accurate, well-explained response supported by relevant evidence from the selected text or texts.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1: Vocabulary Expert Interview
rounds.target: The explorer found a new island in the ocean.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3: Four-Minute Unit Talk
rounds.target: The dog was protecting its territory from other animals.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5: Explain and Respond
rounds.target: Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: She claimed that she finished her homework on time.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The school was established in 1995 and has many students.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: My family will relocate to a new city next month.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'meteorology' mean in this unit?
choices: The study of weather and how it changes.
A narrow body of water between two pieces of land.
A short trip or journey, usually for fun or learning.
rounds.answer: The study of weather and how it changes.
rounds.explanation: meteorology: The study of weather and how it changes.

rounds.prompt: What does 'propose' mean in this unit?
choices: A narrow body of water between two pieces of land.
A short trip or journey, usually for fun or learning.
To suggest an idea or plan for others to think about.
rounds.answer: To suggest an idea or plan for others to think about.
rounds.explanation: propose: To suggest an idea or plan for others to think about.

rounds.prompt: What does 'excursion' mean in this unit?
choices: An area of land that belongs to a person, group, or country.
A short trip or journey, usually for fun or learning.
A narrow body of water between two pieces of land.
rounds.answer: A short trip or journey, usually for fun or learning.
rounds.explanation: excursion: A short trip or journey, usually for fun or learning.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'procedure'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: procedure is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'consists'?
rounds.answer: Verb
rounds.explanation: consists is used as a verb in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'civilization'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: civilization is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: A short trip or journey, usually for fun or learning.
The process of finding your way from one place to another.
A person who moves from place to place instead of living in one home.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: The study of weather and how it changes.
The process of making or creating something.
Made longer in time or space.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: To suggest an idea or plan for others to think about.
To move to a different place.
A state of complete confusion and disorder.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: What does 'caravan' mean?
choices: A group of people living together with their own culture, laws, and way of life.
A group of people travelling together, often across a desert.
A scientist who studies how things move and work in the universe.
The process of finding your way from one place to another.
rounds.answer: A group of people travelling together, often across a desert.
rounds.explanation: We travelled across the country in our caravan, stopping at different campsites.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Inventions and Creativity: source text 2': Read the Story file, “The Last _____”, and answer the reflection questions.
rounds.answer: Straits
rounds.explanation: The text says: Read the Story file, “The Last Straits”, and answer the reflection questions.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Last Straits, part 1': In the heart of East Africa, a young physicist named Ibrahim joined a desert _____ setting out toward the unknown.
rounds.answer: caravan
rounds.explanation: The text says: In the heart of East Africa, a young physicist named Ibrahim joined a desert caravan setting out toward the unknown.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: What does 'straits' mean?
choices: A group of people travelling together, often across a desert.
A narrow body of water between two pieces of land.
A short trip or journey, usually for fun or learning.
An area of land that belongs to a person, group, or country.
rounds.answer: A narrow body of water between two pieces of land.
rounds.explanation: The ships passed through the straits to get to the other side of the island.

rounds.prompt: What does 'explorer' mean?
choices: A group of people travelling together, often across a desert.
A person who travels to new places to discover things.
An area of land that belongs to a person, group, or country.
The process of finding your way from one place to another.
rounds.answer: A person who travels to new places to discover things.
rounds.explanation: The explorer found a new island in the ocean.

rounds.prompt: What does 'excursion' mean?
choices: A group of people living together with their own culture, laws, and way of life.
A short trip or journey, usually for fun or learning.
An area of land that belongs to a person, group, or country.
The process of finding your way from one place to another.
rounds.answer: A short trip or journey, usually for fun or learning.
rounds.explanation: Our class went on an excursion to the science museum.
